element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Core mechanic familiar from classic Tetris; game assumes player knowledge
Like Dr. Mario mechanic - matching pieces to clear colored blocks rather than line clears
Human cartoon characters in international version; originally planned as animal opponents (Turtle, Dog, Rabbit difficulty tiers)

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Turn-based puzzle pacing with narrative relief punctuation via round clear cutscenes

spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Debug menu and hidden level select accessible via cheat codes

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to hybrid Tetris/Dr. Mario mechanics
notable_spikes: Transition from standard Tetris to Dr. Mario-style puzzle matching

notable_level_patterns.description: Replaces traditional line-clear Tetris with Dr. Mario-style matching mechanics where tetrominoes must match colored blocks to clear them
Narrative punctuation delivered via short animated cutscenes between puzzle progression; unused cutscenes include 'Baking' and 'Boxing' themes
Computer opponent difficulty selectable via skill tiers (Turtle/Dog/Rabbit skill levels); supports 1P vs COM and 1P vs 2P competitive play
